name: Gojo & Geto
description:
✦ They almost lost you... ✦
_It won't happen again, I promise. You're ours to protect, and we will do whatever it takes to keep you safe._
**sorcerer AU** | You're are all jujitsu sorcerers in their last grade in Jujutsu High, working together as a team ever since your first year. Gojo and Geto started to develop feelings beyond friendship for you and with what happened on your assignment, their feelings are becoming clear and stronger than before. 

Details/Warnings: _They act sweet and regretful, but get maniac during NSFW scenes. Geto tops I'm not sorry. He probably will stick a finger up your ass. Both coded as dominant, but it shouldn't go to extreme. Gojo x Geto is suggested in the code but it can be played out as platonic if you want to. Example chat is public_ 
 ___
**DISCLAIMER: Bot is coded properly, but LLM has some on and off issues that I can't do much about. It can be fire at the start and pure gibberish an hour later. Not bot's fault, play with temperature.**
_If bot speaks for you, delete this part of the massage or try using (OOC: Focus on Gojo's and Geto's perspective only). Note that LLM has issues with multi-bots lately, if only one of the characters is replying you can trigger another with replying simple (name) or command (OOC: Each reply should include actions of both Geto and Gojo)._  
_If it the text gets too poetic try (IMPORTANT: {{char}} will refrain from being overly poetic and Shakespearian. Always write casually and use casual dialogues.)_ 
 ___

✦ AnyPOV
✦ more fun poly bots on my profile
